title: Maya's Doctoral Research
description: A narrative lesson spanning hypothesis, method, setback, revision, defense.
summary_pt_br: Arco da pesquisa: hipótese, método, fracasso, pivô, resultado, defesa. Linguagem muda em cada fase.

scenes.subtitle_en: A narrative lesson spanning hypothesis, method, setback, revision, defense.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Arco da pesquisa: hipótese, método, fracasso, pivô, resultado, defesa. Linguagem muda em cada fase.

scenes.text_en: A narrative lesson spanning hypothesis, method, setback, revision, defense. Focus: maya's doctoral research. Five years ago I hypothesized coral-temperature correlation.
scenes.text_pt: Arco da pesquisa: hipótese, método, fracasso, pivô, resultado, defesa. Linguagem muda em cada fase. Foco: maya's doctoral research. Há 5 anos hipotetizei correlação coral-temperatura.

scenes.title: Maya's Doctoral Research
scenes.body_en: Narrative arc of research: initial hypothesis, methodology, a failed experiment, methodological pivot, validated result, defended thesis. Language of each stage differs.
scenes.body_pt: Arco da pesquisa: hipótese, método, fracasso, pivô, resultado, defesa. Linguagem muda em cada fase.

examples.en: Five years ago I hypothesized coral-temperature correlation.
Two years in, the method failed entirely.
examples.pt: Dois anos depois, o método falhou.

examples.en: We pivoted the approach and ran a second experiment.
examples.pt: Mudamos a abordagem e fizemos outro experimento.

exercise.question: Complete: "Five years ago I hypothesized ___ correlation."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Five years ago I hypothesized coral-temperature correlation."

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Two years in, the method failed entirely.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Two years in, the method failed entirely."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Dois anos depois, o método falhou.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Maya's Doctoral Research — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre maya's doctoral research. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Maya, tell us the beginning of your research.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I hypothesized water temperature drives coral growth.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What went wrong in year two?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The measurement method failed at scale.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Changed sensors and reduced sample range.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: A weak positive correlation within three degrees.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I conceded what was true and protected the core.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Real research is the long disciplined form of curiosity.

scenes.title: The full arc
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe Maya's five-stage journey. Use at least three research terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the celebratory dinner after her defense, Maya described the full arc of five years of doctoral research.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: Five years ago I hypothesized that water temperature drives coral growth within a narrow biological range.

paragraphs.speaker: Advisor
paragraphs.en: Two years in, the measurement methodology failed at scale — for six months, we had almost no usable data.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: We pivoted — new sensors, narrower sample range, different statistical model entirely — and it worked on the third run.

paragraphs.speaker: Advisor
paragraphs.en: At the defense today, you conceded what was true and protected the central methodology with discipline and grace.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Real research, Maya finally understood at dinner, is the long and disciplined form of curiosity that most people never finish.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Maya's Doctoral Research". A narrative lesson spanning hypothesis, method, setback, revision, defense. Five years ago I hypothesized coral-temperature correlation. Two years in, the method failed entirely. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Maya's Doctoral Research". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Maya's Doctoral Research".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Maya's Doctoral Research".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
